title: Ubiquiti UniFi SmartPower Redundant Power System, USP-RPS
category: Ubiquiti UniFi SmartPower Redundant Power System, USP-RPS
description: The UniFi ® SmartPower Redundant Power System, model USP-RPS, is a proprietary redundant power system designed to protect up to six UniFi SmartPower supported devices from sudden power supply module failure. The USP-RPS continually monitors all attached devices. In the event of an internal AC/DC power supply failure, failover is automatic so your network continues to operate with no interruption in service. With a 950W DC power budget, the USP-RPS can protect a variety of high-power devices,… (6) USP DC output ports (1) Ethernet port 1U Rackmountable (kit included) 1.3" Touchscreen display with status information Managed by UniFi Network Controller version: 5.12.11 or later UniFi SmartPower device USP cable Power cord Rackmount ears + screws
